items.title: New York's Title Needs An Asterisk
items.body_excerpt: The New York Knicks won the 2025-26 NBA Championship on Saturday night, the first in 53 years. But in the history books, the title should carry an asterisk. With so much help on their side, the Knicks join a short group of champions that warrant an asterisk on their name. Here’s…
